text: The end of a communal gathering always carries a peculiar aftertaste—a mingling of contentment and quiet loneliness. As the farewell echoes, I step into another space of thought and learning. The contrast between rooms, one filled with people departing and another with vibrant displays of research and innovation, makes me keenly aware of my own transience. I feel like an observer on the threshold between connection and retreat, energized by curiosity and tinged by the melancholic beauty of endings.
